title: i just asked my girlfriend if her blood pattern was blue
display_title: i just asked my girlfriend if her blood pattern was blue
wikitext:
[]: i just asked my girlfriend if her blood pattern was blue.... Post by duexmachina » Sat Dec 01, 2012 12:35 am she stared at me confused, then i explained to her that it must be, because she was definitely an angel. guess who's getting laid tonight?

[]: Post by esselfortium » Sat Dec 01, 2012 12:40 am Not you?

[]: Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sat Dec 01, 2012 12:42 am Even if she was an Angel, a line that bad should have brought her AT field to maximum strength, and shoved you out the door.

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Sat Dec 01, 2012 12:51 am Well, it depends. Is your girlfriend an Eva-initiate? Or did the reference just pass completely over her head, as everyone is assuming?

[]: Post by esselfortium » Sat Dec 01, 2012 12:53 am I didn't assume anything. It was just really bad.

[]: Post by Rj123541 » Sat Dec 01, 2012 1:22 am Shouldn't this be in Off topic?

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Sat Dec 01, 2012 1:30 am Rj123541 wrote: Shouldn't this be in Off topic?

[]: Post by Redtophat » Sat Dec 01, 2012 2:48 am So buddo, you get any or not? Did you achieve the fruit of Human Instrumentality or did it all go down like the second impact?

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Dec 01, 2012 3:25 am I had a feeling that this would be a "bad chat-up lines" thread.

[]: Post by duexmachina » Sat Dec 01, 2012 5:10 am Figures you nerds would be bitter about a person having a cheap laugh at a cheesy eva joke. Come on, evageeks, you're better than that. lol. Hats off to you, seele00.

[]: Post by esselfortium » Sat Dec 01, 2012 5:39 am duexmachina wrote: Figures you nerds would be bitter about a person having a cheap laugh at a cheesy eva joke. Come on, evageeks, you're better than that. lol. Hats off to you, seele00.

[]: Post by A.T. Fish » Sat Dec 01, 2012 6:45 am duexmachina wrote: Figures you nerds would be bitter about a person having a cheap laugh at a cheesy eva joke. Come on, evageeks, you're better than that.

[]: Post by TehDonutKing » Sat Dec 01, 2012 9:56 am Baby, are you a vampire? Because i'd stab you with my wood.

[]: Post by Nyanlathotep » Sat Dec 01, 2012 11:31 am duexmachina wrote: Figures you nerds would be bitter about a person having a cheap laugh at a cheesy eva joke. Come on, evageeks, you're better than that. lol. Hats off to you, seele00.

[]: Post by Choo1701 » Sat Dec 01, 2012 1:34 pm duexmachina wrote: Figures you nerds would be bitter about a person having a cheap laugh at a cheesy eva joke. Come on, evageeks, you're better than that.

[]: Post by duexmachina » Sat Dec 01, 2012 6:14 pm I'm on this anime forum because I love Eva. I don't really care how corny or bad the joke was. I had a laugh to myself from it. Then I figure I would share. I didn't expect laughs, just forgot how hostile you neckbeards were. Anyways, don't take any offense to what I have said. Like I stated, I'm here because of Eva. Not to fight with some grinch like kids.

[]: Post by TehDonutKing » Sat Dec 01, 2012 6:41 pm I thought it was funny....

[]: Post by esselfortium » Sat Dec 01, 2012 6:53 pm duexmachina wrote: I'm on this anime forum because I love Eva. I don't really care how corny or bad the joke was. I had a laugh to myself from it. Then I figure I would share. I didn't expect laughs, just forgot how hostile you neckbeards were. Anyways, don't take any offense to what I have said. Like I stated, I'm here because of Eva. Not to fight with some grinch like kids.

[]: Post by duexmachina » Sat Dec 01, 2012 6:55 pm Okay, Internet user I will never meet.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sat Dec 01, 2012 6:56 pm We're done here, right?
